title: Real Girl
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 (12). Manga complete; AniList lists 51 chapters across 13 volumes (some sources cite 47 numbered chapters across 12 volumes, likely due to how bonus/special chapters are split — AniList's count is used here). A faithful, 0%-filler adaptation covering the full story; S1 ends around the manga's halfway point, S2 covers the remainder through the ending.
